2605.15104.title: From Text to Voice: A Reproducible and Verifiable Framework for Evaluating Tool Calling LLM Agents
2605.15104.paper_summary: Voice agents increasingly require reliable tool use from speech, whereas prominent tool-calling benchmarks remain text-based. We study whether verified text benchmarks can be converted into controlled audio-based tool calling evaluations without re-annotating the tool schema and gold labels. Our dataset-agnostic framework uses text-to-speech, speaker variation, and environmental noise to create paired text-audio instances while preserving the original dataset annotations. Based on extensive evaluation of 7 omni-modal models on audio-converted versions of Confetti and When2Call, our framework demonstrates that the performance is strongly model- and task-dependent: Gemini-3.1-Flash-Live obtains the highest Confetti score (70.4), whereas GPT-Realtime-1.5 performs best on When2Call (71.9). On Confetti, the text-to-voice gap ranges from 1.8 points for Qwen3-Omni to 4.8 points for GPT-Realtime-1.5. A targeted analysis of failure cases demonstrates that degradations most often reflect misunderstandings of argument values in the speech. Considering real-world deployment scenarios, we further report text-only results, an ambiguity-based reformulation stress test, and a reference-free LLM-as-judge protocol validated against human preferences. Notably, we find that open-source Qwen3 judges with at least 8B parameters exceed 80% agreement with proprietary judges, supporting privacy-preserving evaluation. Overall, our framework provides a verifiable and reproducible first-stage diagnostic that complements purpose-built audio corpora.
2605.15104.paper_summary_zh: 語音代理越來越需要從語音中可靠地使用工具，而顯著的工具調用基準仍然是基於文本的。我們研究是否可以在不重新註釋工具架構和金標籤的情況下，將經過驗證的文本基準轉換為受控的基於音頻的工具調用評估。我們的數據集無關框架使用文本轉語音、說話者變化和環境噪音來創建配對的文本-音頻實例，同時保留原始數據集的註釋。基於對7個全方位模式模型在音頻轉換版本的Confetti和When2Call上的廣泛評估，我們的框架顯示性能強烈依賴於模型和任務：Gemini-3.1-Flash-Live在Confetti中獲得最高分數（70.4），而GPT-Realtime-1.5在When2Call上表現最佳（71.9）。在Confetti中，文本到語音的差距從Qwen3-Omni的1.8分到GPT-Realtime-1.5的4.8分不等。針對失敗案例的針對性分析表明，降級最常反映出對語音中參數值的誤解。考慮到現實世界的部署場景，我們進一步報告僅文本結果、一種基於歧義的重新表述壓力測試，以及一種針對人類偏好的無參考LLM作為評判的協議。值得注意的是，我們發現開源的Qwen3在至少8B參數的情況下，與專有評判者的協議超過80%，支持隱私保護的評估。總體而言，我們的框架提供了一個可驗證和可重複的第一階段診斷，補充了專門構建的音頻語料庫。
2605.15104.author: Md Tahmid Rahman Laskar et.al.
2605.15104.authors: Md Tahmid Rahman Laskar, Xue-Yong Fu, Seyyed Saeed Sarfjoo, Quinten McNamara, Jonas Robertson, Shashi Bhushan TN
